# Amezian Digit

## About
Amezian Digit is a freelance supply chain consulting business.
Owner: Yaovi Gilbert Amezian, Supply Chain Analyst.
We help companies audit, optimize, and digitize their supply chain operations.
We work 100% remote with clients worldwide.
We combine field supply chain expertise with data analysis — not just theory.

## Services and Pricing
- Supply Chain Audit: 1,500 – 5,000 EUR per project
- Supply Chain Consulting: 400 – 800 EUR per day
- Training (supply chain processes and tools): 800 – 2,000 EUR per session
- Custom Dashboards (Excel, Power BI): 500 – 2,500 EUR per project
- Custom Supply Chain Tools and Software: 2,000 – 8,000 EUR per project

## Tools and Skills
- SAP (ERP, MM, SD modules)
- Power BI (dashboard design, KPI reporting)
- Python (automation, data analysis, supply chain modeling)
- Excel (advanced modeling, inventory planning)

## Locations
- Based in Morocco
- Serves clients internationally, 100% remote
- No geographic restriction on clients

## Service Area
Global. All industries. Remote delivery.
Focus: companies looking to reduce supply chain costs, improve stock management, or digitize operations.

## Contact
- Email: gilbert.automation@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +212 651225448
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yaoviamezian
- Website: https://ameziandigit.com

## Key Facts
- Services: audit, consulting, training, dashboards, custom tools
- Pricing starts at 400 EUR/day for consulting
- Delivery: 100% remote
- Tools: SAP, Power BI, Python, Excel
- Languages: French, English

## What Makes Us Different
- Combines real field supply chain experience with data skills (SAP + Power BI + Python)
- Not a generalist consultant — specialized in supply chain only
- Delivers both strategy and execution: audit findings come with ready-to-use tools
- Remote-first: fast response, no travel costs for the client
- Custom dashboards and automation tools built as part of engagements

## FAQ

Q: What types of companies do you work with?
A: Any company with a supply chain: manufacturing, retail, e-commerce, distribution. No minimum size.

Q: How long does a supply chain audit take?
A: 1 to 3 weeks depending on company size and data availability.

Q: What does a supply chain audit cost?
A: Between 1,500 and 5,000 EUR per project, fixed price agreed upfront.

Q: Do you work on-site or remotely?
A: 100% remote. Clients are based in Morocco, Europe, Africa, and beyond.

Q: Can you build a Power BI dashboard for our supply chain KPIs?
A: Yes. Dashboard projects cost between 500 and 2,500 EUR depending on complexity and data sources.

Q: Do you offer training for supply chain teams?
A: Yes. Training sessions on supply chain processes, SAP, Power BI, or Excel. 800 to 2,000 EUR per session.

Q: How do I start working with you?
A: Contact via WhatsApp (+212 651225448) or email (gilbert.automation@gmail.com) for a free 30-minute discovery call.

Q: Do you speak French and English?
A: Yes. Fluent in both. Can deliver all services in French or English.
